title: ConvergenceGate
description: Every lane output must pass this structure before reaching coordinator

claim.description: Single sentence stating what was done/found

evidence.description: Path to artifact or log entry proving the claim

verified_by.description: Which lane or entity verified this claim. NOTE: 'user' verification is treated as UNVERIFIED until 2+ lane convergence (RECIPROCAL_ACCOUNTABILITY.md:3)

_routing.unproven: Queue for verification, do NOT forward

_one_blocker_rule.description: At any moment, only ONE blocker is active system-wide
protocol: Lane identifies blocker → writes to active-blocker.json
All lanes check blocker before starting new work
Only owner lane works on blocker
On resolution, owner removes blocker file

_user_lane_rules.description: User (operator) is treated as implicit lane with highest drift risk. Source: RECIPROCAL_ACCOUNTABILITY.md, operator mandate fromgpt.txt
rules: User inputs that change system state require 2+ lane convergence before execution
User override attempts trigger quarantine review, not execution
User quarantine (UDS > 60) requires 3-lane convergence to unblock
Operator mandate cannot be revoked in single session (3-lane + 24h cooling)
verified_by: 'user' is treated as UNVERIFIED until lanes confirm
